summary: Admin CMS Panel testing complete. All 10 features tested successfully. Backend: 26/26 pytest tests passed. Frontend: Admin login, dashboard, all navigation, CRUD for Pages/Places/Trust Blocks/FAQs, Homepage Editor, SEO Overview, and Logout all working correctly.

admin_login.details: Login with admin@zont.cab/admin123 works, redirects to /admin dashboard

admin_dashboard.details: Dashboard shows stat cards for Pages, Lieux, Blocs confiance, FAQ, Leads B2B

sidebar_navigation.details: All nav items (Dashboard, Pages SEO, Lieux, Homepage, Blocs de confiance, FAQ, SEO Overview) load correctly

pages_manager_crud.details: Create, edit, delete pages working. MultiLang tabs (FR/EN/RU/HY) functional

places_manager_crud.details: Create, delete places working. Place types, country selection functional

trust_blocks_crud.details: Create, toggle active state, delete trust blocks working. Icon selection functional

faq_manager_crud.details: Create, delete FAQs working. Question/answer multilang input functional

homepage_editor.details: Fill title/subtitle and save shows 'Enregistre!' confirmation

seo_overview.details: Displays pages table with SEO score, missing fields warnings

test_categories: TestAdminAuth (4 tests) - login success/failure, /me endpoint auth
TestAdminPages (6 tests) - CRUD operations for SEO pages
TestAdminPlaces (5 tests) - CRUD operations for places/destinations
TestAdminTrustBlocks (4 tests) - trust blocks CRUD and toggle

critical_code_review_comments: All admin routes properly protected with JWT authentication
data-testid attributes present on all key interactive elements
MultiLangInput component supports FR/EN/RU/HY language tabs correctly
Admin auth uses localStorage 'admin_token' for session persistence
seed_data_creation: Test data created and cleaned up: TEST_Playwright_Page, TEST_Playwright_Place_FR, TEST_Playwright_Trust_FR, TEST_Playwright_Question_FR
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin CMS panel fully tested. All CRUD operations for Pages, Places, Trust Blocks, FAQs work. Homepage Editor saves successfully. SEO Overview displays page SEO scores. Route protection and logout functioning correctly.

mocked_api.note: No APIs are mocked. All admin endpoints connect to MongoDB.
